title: <$componentType>
breadcrumbs: ProcScript: Precompiler Directives and Uniface Constants
text: <$componentType> Uniface component type <$componentType> Values Value Meaning A Application shell F Form component R Report component D Dynamic server page component P Static server page component S Service component E Entity service component N Session service component Scope Component, entity, and field triggers Description The <$componentType> compile-time constant has the same value as ProcScript function $componenttype .
